name: PR Review (API + Web)
prompt: Check repos clvs_us-homeinspector-inspector_api and clvs_us-homeinspector-inspector_web_ui for open PRs. For each PR that either has no review from me or has new commits since my last review, run /hip-reviewer. Skip PRs I authored. Post reviews directly to GitHub.
preflight: test $(gh pr list --repo CoreLogicCo/clvs_us-homeinspector-inspector_api --state open --json number --jq length 2>/dev/null || echo 0) -gt 0 || test $(gh pr list --repo CoreLogicCo/clvs_us-homeinspector-inspector_web_ui --state open --json number --jq length 2>/dev/null || echo 0) -gt 0
